meaning: n.眩目的光,显眼,怒目而视,(冰等的表面)光滑的表面v.闪耀
examples: He gave me an icy glare.
I shielded my eyes against the glare.
His glasses magnified his irritable glare.
Now under the agency s glare: Subchapter S corporations, a popular vehicle of choice for many entrepreneurs.
The screen will be a 1, 600 x 900 non-IPS panel with an anti-glare matte finish.
